mapper.select: SELECT * FROM upgrade_whitelist WHERE is_active = true
SELECT * FROM upgrade_whitelist WHERE is_active = true AND (platform = #{platform} OR platform IS NULL)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM upgrade_whitelist WHERE platform = #{platform} AND source_strategy_id IS NOT NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO upgrade_whitelist (source_strategy_id, rule_type, rule_value, target_version, platform, is_active, created_at) VALUES (#{sourceStrategyId}, #{ruleType}, #{ruleValue}, #{targetVersion}, #{platform}, #{isActive}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM upgrade_whitelist WHERE platform = #{platform} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM upgrade_whitelist WHERE target_version = #{targetVersion} ORDER BY created_at DESC
